name: Team view shows org, fleet, and governance
description: Verify that the Team object view renders the human org, AI fleet, reliability, evals, and deployment governance surfaces.

planSteps.description: Verify that the Team view renders without a blank screen, browser error, or stuck loading state.
Verify that the Org section is visible with at least one human member.
Verify that the Fleet section is visible with agent rows or a clear empty state.
Verify that Agent reliability is visible.
Verify that Evals and Deployment governance sections are visible.
